sentences.arabic: يَتَمَيَّزُ الْقُرْآنُ الْكَرِيمُ بِأُسْلُوبٍ لُغَوِيٍّ فَرِيدٍ.
sentences.translation: Časni Kur'an se odlikuje jedinstvenim jezičkim stilom.
sentences.translationEn: The Holy Quran is characterized by a unique linguistic style.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ الْكُتَّابُ الْعَرَبُ الْكَثِيرَ مِن مَفْرَدَاتِهِ وَتَعَابِيرِهِ.
sentences.translation: Arapski pisci su naučili mnogo iz njegovog rječnika i izraza.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic writers learned a lot from its vocabulary and expressions.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْأُسْلُوبُ يُؤَثِّرُ فِي الْأَدَبِ حَتَّى يَوْمِنَا هَذَا.
sentences.translation: Ovaj stil utiče na književnost sve do danas.
sentences.translationEn: This style influences literature to this day.

sentences.arabic: نَجِدُ فِي النُّصُوصِ الْأَدَبِيَّةِ كَلِمَاتٍ تَدُلُّ عَلَى الصَّبْرِ وَالْإِيمَانِ.
sentences.translation: U književnim tekstovima nalazimo riječi koje ukazuju na strpljenje i vjeru.
sentences.translationEn: In literary texts, we find words that indicate patience and faith.

sentences.arabic: اللُّغَةُ الْفَصِيحَةُ تَرْبِطُ بَيْنَ الْمَاضِي وَالْحَاضِرِ.
sentences.translation: Književni jezik povezuje prošlost i sadašnjost.
sentences.translationEn: The eloquent language connects the past and the present.
